data.title: Update test infrastructure and .test-index for reject->warn migration
data.description:
## What

Update all test files and .test-index entries so they expect `warn` / SIZE_WARNING instead of `reject`. These changes must be committed BEFORE Task 2 modifies the classifier, producing RED failures that Task 2 then satisfies GREEN.

## testing_mode: UPDATE

## TDD Requirement

After this task is complete and before Task 2 is implemented, the following tests must FAIL (RED):
- `test_classifier_size_action_warn_at_600` (renamed from reject) — expects `warn` from classifier but classifier still emits `reject`
- `test_classifier_size_warning_stderr_at_600` — expects SIZE_WARNING on stderr, but classifier emits nothing to stderr
- `test_classifier_size_action_upgrade_at_599` — boundary regression: 599-line diff must produce `upgrade` not `warn`
- `test_workflow_step3_warn_when_size_action_is_warn` — expects warn-path behavior in REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md Step 3b, which does not yet exist

## Files to Modify

### tests/hooks/test-review-complexity-classifier.sh
- Rename `test_classifier_size_action_reject_at_600` → `test_classifier_size_action_warn_at_600`; update assertion from `reject` → `warn`
- Add `test_classifier_size_warning_stderr_at_600`: runs classifier with 600-line injected count, asserts stderr contains `SIZE_WARNING: 600`
- Add `test_classifier_size_action_upgrade_at_599`: runs classifier with 599-line injected count, asserts size_action=`upgrade` (not `warn`)
- Update runner invocation at line 822 to include the two new test function names

### tests/workflows/test-review-workflow-size-thresholds.sh
- Rename all reject-path test functions to warn-path equivalents
- `_simulate_step3_dispatch` reset block (~line 90): rename `SIZE_REJECTION_MSG=""` → `SIZE_WARNING_MSG=""`
- `_simulate_step3b_from_classifier_json` helper: update `reject)` branch → `warn)` branch
- Update `test_workflow_step3_no_size_limit_on_repass` fixture: `size_action:"reject"` → `size_action:"warn"`
- Update `test_workflow_step3_merge_commit_bypass` fixture: `size_action:"reject"` → `size_action:"warn"`
- Add `SIZE_REJECTION=0` assertion in warn test to verify no exit-1 occurs
- Add structural RED check asserting REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md Step 3b contains `SIZE_ACTION.*warn`

### tests/hooks/test-review-workflow-classifier-dispatch.sh
- Update comment at line ~525 (reject references)
- Remove or rename `test_workflow_step3_rejection_message_references_guide` (~lines 580-596): this test checks REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md references `large-diff-splitting-guide` — Task 4 removes that reference, so update this test to assert the guide reference is NOT present (or remove if it provides no further value)

### .test-index
- MERGE (do NOT append new lines) RED markers into the EXISTING entry for `plugins/dso/scripts/review-complexity-classifier.sh`:
  add `[test_classifier_size_action_warn_at_600]`, `[test_classifier_size_warning_stderr_at_600]`, `[test_classifier_size_action_upgrade_at_599]` to the existing line
- MERGE RED markers into the EXISTING entry for `plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md`:
  add `[test_workflow_step3_warn_when_size_action_is_warn]`, `[test_integration_warn_path_end_to_end]` to the existing line
- Result: exactly one line per source file (no duplicate entries)

## Acceptance Criteria

**Universal**
- [ ] Tests pass: `poetry run pytest` (or bash runner for .sh tests) — all tests in scope exit 0
  Verify: `bash tests/unit/scripts/test-review-complexity-classifier.sh 2>&1 | tail -5`
- [ ] Lint: no lint errors
  Verify: `make lint 2>&1 | tail -5`
- [ ] Format: no format errors
  Verify: `make format --check 2>&1 | tail -5`

**Task-specific**
- [ ] test_classifier_size_action_warn_at_600 exists in test-review-complexity-classifier.sh
  Verify: `grep -c 'test_classifier_size_action_warn_at_600' tests/hooks/test-review-complexity-classifier.sh`
- [ ] test_classifier_size_action_upgrade_at_599 exists (boundary test)
  Verify: `grep -c 'test_classifier_size_action_upgrade_at_599' tests/hooks/test-review-complexity-classifier.sh`
- [ ] No `test_classifier_size_action_reject_at_600` reference remains
  Verify: `! grep -r 'size_action_reject_at_600' tests/ 2>/dev/null && echo PASS`
- [ ] SIZE_REJECTION_MSG renamed to SIZE_WARNING_MSG in test helpers
  Verify: `! grep -r 'SIZE_REJECTION_MSG' tests/ 2>/dev/null && echo PASS`
- [ ] .test-index has no duplicate source-file entries
  Verify: `sort .test-index | uniq -d | wc -l | grep -q '^0$' && echo PASS`
- [ ] RED markers merged into existing .test-index lines (not new lines)
  Verify: `grep 'review-complexity-classifier.sh' .test-index | wc -l | grep -q '^1$' && echo PASS`
  Verify: `grep 'REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md' .test-index | wc -l | grep -q '^1$' && echo PASS`
